query_metadata.original_query: can you give me the details about the patient who has diabetes and what medications is he/she is on

response.message: Successfully retrieved details of patients with diabetes-related conditions and their medications.
response.query_understanding: Fetch details of patients diagnosed with diabetes (or related conditions) and the medications they are on.
response.sql_query: SELECT conditions."PATIENT_ID", conditions."CONDITION_DESCRIPTION", medications."MEDICATION_DESCRIPTION", medications."START", medications."STOP" FROM conditions INNER JOIN medications ON conditions."PATIENT_ID" = medications."PATIENT_ID" WHERE conditions."CONDITION_DESCRIPTION" ILIKE '%diabetes%' LIMIT 10;

data.value: data={'PATIENT_ID': 'bfb6537b-535a-4f31-9a56-073220f96a17', 'CONDITION_DESCRIPTION': 'Prediabetes', 'MEDICATION_DESCRIPTION': 'Penicillin V Potassium 500 MG Oral Tablet', 'START': '2017-07-31', 'STOP': '2017-08-10'}

metadata.reasoning: Joined the conditions and medications tables on patient_id to find patients with diabetes-related conditions and their medications.
